en.extract:
The white-browed triller (Lalage moesta) is a species of bird in the family Campephagidae. It is endemic to Indonesia, where it occurs in the Tanimbar Islands.

The '''white-browed triller''' ('''''Lalage moesta''''') is a species of [[bird]] in the family [[Campephagidae]]. It is [[Endemism|endemic]] to [[Indonesia]], where it occurs in the [[Tanimbar Islands]].

zh.extract:
白眉鸣鹃鵙（学名：Lalage moesta）是山椒鸟科鸣鹃鵙属的一种，为印度尼西亚的特有种。
